column1: # ESP32 ArtNetNode — dual-slot OTA partition table (4 MB flash)
# Two app slots (ota_0 / ota_1) plus otadata let the firmware be updated over the
# network: the node runs one slot
column2: writes the new image into the other

column1: # switches and reboots (with bootloader rollback if the new image fails). There is
# no factory and no phy_init partition — this is an Ethernet-only node with no
# WiFi PHY init data. First boot (empty otadata) runs ota_0.
# Layout fills the 4 MB exactly with no alignment gaps: nvs+otadata end on the
# 0x10000 boundary the app partitions must align to.
